parameters.subject: =🌟 VIP Order Confirmed — Thank You {{ $json.firstName }}!
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.firstName }},

As one of our VIP customers, you mean the world to us. Your order #{{ $json.orderId }} for {{ $json.product }} (${{ $json.amount }}) is confirmed and being prioritized.

🎁 As a thank you, use code *{{ $json.discountCode }}* for 20% off your next order.

You've ordered with us {{ $json.orderCount }} times — we genuinely appreciate your loyalty.

Warm regards,
The Team

parameters.subject: =👋 Welcome Back {{ $json.firstName }}! Order Confirmed
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.firstName }},

Great to see you again! Your order #{{ $json.orderId }} for {{ $json.product }} (${{ $json.amount }}) is confirmed.

💛 Here's a loyalty reward — use *{{ $json.discountCode }}* for 10% off your next purchase.

Thanks for coming back!
The Team

parameters.subject: =🎉 Order Confirmed {{ $json.firstName }} — Welcome!
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $json.firstName }},

Thank you for your first order! We're so excited to have you.

Your order #{{ $json.orderId }} for {{ $json.product }} (${{ $json.amount }}) is confirmed and on its way.

🎁 As a welcome gift, use *{{ $json.discountCode }}* for 5% off your next order.

Welcome to the family!
The Team
